summary:
An antiphlogistic refers to a drug class designed specifically for reducing inflammation by suppressing inflammatory responses through mechanisms such as inhibiting cytokine production and modulating immune cell activity. It does not promote but rather suppresses inflammation; therefore, it cannot promote inflammation.
